hero_match.title: Sheffield Shield, 2024-25 Final (Victoria vs South Australia)
hero_match.user_agent: Mozilla/5.0 (Linux; Android 10; K) AppleWebKit/537.36 (KHTML, like Gecko) Chrome/120.0.0.0 Mobile Safari/537.36

summary: The Sheffield Shield 2024-25 Final is in progress, concluding today, March 29, 2026. No matches are scheduled for the Chandigarh T20 or the AFC U20 Asian Cup China, 2025, as those tournaments are concluded or in a different season.
